text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some time has passed since I officially became Mejiro Palmer's
trainer.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Okay, one more lap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's gratifying to see just how much she's enjoying her newly awakened
running style.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Similar to how many run in freestyle races, she gives it her all right
from the start and never lets up.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Hraaagh! Y'all better stop screwin' around if you wanna win!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Tch! Haaah!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... phew! Sheesh, this really is just so fun!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she's to keep running without ever hitting the brakes, then learning
some good power distribution techniques will be essential.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Any changes I introduce won't be too drastic, however. I never want
to see that smile on her face fade away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Trainer, I've still got gas in the tank!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Okay, here goes!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I never want to keep her from running the way that makes her happy.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Isn't that style way too reckless?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
While it's definitely important for them to have fun while running,
that's no way to go about winning. It's just so... unconventional.

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
There has to be a more sensible way to approach a front running
strategy. Right now, it seems like she just runs straight ahead without
any kind of plan.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And what would that entail, I wonder?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff... phew!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Every race has its rules. Plus, all racers seek out a way to run that's
unique to them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Some may see certain runners as reckless and unconventional. Is it
really my place to police that?

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text:
You should put a stop to it while you still can. You're doing this for
her sake, aren't y—

text_block_list.name: New Trainer A
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even if they can't see it now, it's my duty to have everyone
acknowledge that this is how Mejiro Palmer rules the track.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I saw you talkin' to that other trainer earlier. You seemed to be
frowning big time. Did something happen?
choice_data_list:
She actually just approached me out of the
blue.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Gotcha! That's gotta be because you're so approachable! So she
needed advice and you were deep in thought?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Wait, don't tell me... 'Twas a confession of love? So your lucky day
finally rolled around! Oh Trainer, you devil, you!
choice_data_list: N-no! She just came to me with a complaint!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Haha, I see. A complaint, huh? But if she needed to say something
during our training session...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Then it must've been about me and my runnin', huh. Makes sense! I
can't say I don't get where she's coming from.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
(I mean, I know that my new style is pretty crazy, but to see Trainer
get called out for it...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: So hey, Train—
choice_data_list: They just don't get it yet.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Hahaha! Right?! It's just as you say! Together... we're gonna show
them what I'm made of!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We raise both hands high into the air—as if we're aiming to raise the
roof. The resounding echo of a high five soon follows.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter what anyone says, and even if they laugh in our faces... I've
promised to keep pushing us forward, no matter what.
